summary: Model serving UI should support custom theme colors and layout customization
description:
**Feature request disguised as bug:**

The model serving dashboard currently uses a fixed blue theme with a
predetermined layout. Users from different teams want to customize:

1. Primary and secondary theme colors to match their team branding
2. Dashboard widget layout (drag-and-drop rearrangement)
3. Custom logo placement in the header
4. Font family and size preferences
5. Dark mode / light mode toggle with custom accent colors

Currently none of these are configurable. The dashboard looks the same
for everyone. This makes it hard for teams to differentiate their instances
when managing multiple deployments.

**Repo:** https://github.com/example-org/model-serving-ui

**Expected behavior:**
Dashboard should support full theme customization per-user and per-team.

**Actual behavior:**
Dashboard has a hardcoded blue theme with no customization options.

**Impact:** Teams cannot brand their model serving dashboards.
